title: Lock the generic OMO session-orchestrator spec before implementation
summary: Define the reusable session-orchestrated runner contract, Homecook adapter boundary, repo-local runtime state, and scheduled Claude resume policy before implementation starts.
goal: Freeze the generic OMO session reuse and pause/resume contract so the follow-up implementation branch can build against a stable workflow-v2 spec.

required_checks: pnpm exec vitest run tests/workflow-v2-docs.test.ts tests/omo-lite-config.test.ts
verify_commands: pnpm exec vitest run tests/workflow-v2-docs.test.ts tests/omo-lite-config.test.ts

open_questions: Should the generic core expose retry delay as a per-project profile default or a global orchestrator default
Should session export/import become part of the same implementation phase or remain a later recovery enhancement
